utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these sections. Each section is fully specified: 
1) property — includes name, type, location, price, and viewing_date. 
2) financing — includes type, interest rate, amortization, down payment, monthly payment, and closing fees. 
3) legal_services — includes provider, services, cost, and turnaround_time. 
4) moving_services — includes provider, services, fragile_items, cost, and move_in_date. 
5) setup_services — includes utility providers and setup_costs. 
6) total_budget — includes detailed cost breakdown. All items are fully detailed according to expectations.
